  • [ - ] Icarax - member since 27-Sep-17

    poland made it easy for argentina. in attack their only strategy was long balls to the few players up front & hope for some good link-up play & for other players to catch up but it never really happened as argentinas aggressive pressure on the first touch, decisive tackling & energy covered everything, it was always gonna be tough with that amount of players staying back. in defense, poland had a decent shape & the defenders were somewhat decisive and error-free (shouldve marked both scorer and assister of the first goal way better), they had too much respect for argentina, i was appalled at how much space they were giving them (esp messi & near box), at the lack of aggression, arg had all the freedom to do their game. poland sacrificed any control they could have in midfield by totally parking the bus and almost seeming like they didn't want to score the way they kept coming back instantly. against the other teams arg had it hard to navigate thru the middle, this was lightwork

    3 years ago
     +4 Reply Report Sign in or join us to rate comments! Sign In || Join Us
